---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a small improvement that fits the TrustMCP CLI scope
title: "feature: "
labels: [enhancement]
---

## Problem

What practical problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest change that would help.

## Why this fits TrustMCP

TrustMCP is intentionally a narrow static audit CLI. Explain how your request fits that boundary and does not require a hosted platform, registry, account system, or dynamic execution.

## Additional context

Add example findings, repositories, or workflows if they help explain the request.
